name: Union Find (Disjoint Set Union)
description:
Implement the Union-Find (Disjoint Set Union) data structure with path compression and union by rank. Support the following operations:
- find(x): Find the root representative of x's set.
- union(x, y): Merge the sets containing x and y.
- connected(x, y): Check if x and y are in the same set.
Given n elements (0 to n-1) and a list of union operations, determine which pairs are connected.

performance.stress_intent: verify connectivity semantics on exhaustive small edge subsets and large chained components
